description: SOTA embedding model from mixedbread.ai. Surpasses OpenAI text-embedding-3-large on MTEB.
fullDescription:
## MODEL OVERVIEW
mxbai-embed-large is a state-of-the-art text embedding model from mixedbread.ai, achieving top MTEB scores for Bert-large sized models. It surpasses OpenAI's text-embedding-3-large and matches models 20x larger.

## Key Features
- **SOTA on MTEB**: Top performance for Bert-large class models
- **Beats OpenAI**: Surpasses text-embedding-3-large
- **Strong Generalization**: Trained without MTEB data overlap
- **Compact**: 335M parameters, only 670MB
- **CPU-Friendly**: Efficient inference without GPU

## Specifications
- Parameters: 335M
- Max Sequence Length: 512 tokens
- Embedding Dimension: 1024
- Size: 670MB
- License: Apache 2.0
modelReadme: mxbai-embed-large is a state-of-the-art large embedding model from mixedbread.ai that achieves SOTA performance for Bert-large sized models on MTEB, surpassing OpenAI's text-embedding-3-large and matching models 20x larger. It was trained without MTEB data overlap, demonstrating strong generalization across domains, tasks, and text lengths.
name: mxbai-embed-large
title: MixedBread Embed Large
